top3.sql:
SELECT d.driverRef
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 20
  AND r.position IS NULL
  AND r.statusId IN (
    SELECT statusId
    FROM status
    WHERE status = 'Eliminated'
  );

SELECT d.driverRef
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 20
  AND r.statusId = 1; -- Assuming statusId = 1 means 'Eliminated' or similar first-period elimination

SELECT d.driverRef
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 20
  AND r.position IS NULL
  AND r.statusId IN (
    SELECT statusId
    FROM status
    WHERE status = 'Eliminated'
  );

SELECT d.driverRef
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 20
  AND r.statusId = 1; -- Assuming statusId = 1 means 'Eliminated' or similar first-period elimination

SELECT d.driverRef
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE r.raceId = 20
  AND s.status = 'Eliminated'
  AND r.position IS NULL;

SELECT d.driverRef
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 20
  AND r.position IS NULL
  AND r.statusId IN (

    FROM status
    WHERE status = 'Eliminated'

SELECT d.driverRef
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 20
  AND r.statusId = 1; -- Assuming statusId = 1 means 'Eliminated' or similar first-period elimination

SELECT d.driverRef
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN status s ON r.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE r.raceId = 20
  AND s.status = 'Eliminated'
  AND r.position IS NULL;

final.sql:
SELECT d.driverRef
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 20
  AND r.position IS NULL
  AND r.statusId IN (
    SELECT statusId
    FROM status
    WHERE status = 'Eliminated'
  );
